entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched publicly in January 2019 under the Bankera brand and consolidated into SpectroCoin Exchange during 2020.
entity.notes: Bankera announced the rebranding process on 2020-09-30. HEI uses 2020-12-28 as the terminal Bankera Exchange date because an independent exchange-history source records the venue as no longer active under the Bankera name on that date. SpectroCoin Exchange is retained as the successor brand, not a separate record created by this batch.

events.title: Bankera Exchange launched publicly
events.description: Bankera opened its centralized cryptocurrency exchange and trading platform to the general public.
events.notes: The launch date was announced in advance and confirmed by a first-party post published after launch.

events.title: Bankera Exchange became SpectroCoin Exchange
events.description: Bankera consolidated its crypto products under the SpectroCoin brand and the exchange ceased operating under the Bankera Exchange name.
events.notes: The first-party rebrand announcement was published on 2020-09-30; the exact completion marker comes from an independent exchange-history update dated 2020-12-28.

evidence.title: Save the Dates – Bankera Exchange Launch Is Confirmed!
evidence.notes: First-party announcement scheduled the public launch for January 7, 2019.

evidence.title: How to Start Trading on Bankera Exchange?
evidence.notes: First-party post published after launch confirms that the official launch occurred the previous week.

evidence.title: Bankera Progress Update
evidence.notes: First-party update states that Bankera was rebranding the exchange to SpectroCoin Exchange as part of a consolidation of crypto products.

evidence.title: Bankera exchange history
evidence.notes: Independent exchange-history update records that Bankera was no longer active under that name and had rebranded to SpectroCoin Exchange on December 28, 2020.

evidence.title: Bankera Exchange original domain redirect
evidence.notes: The historical Bankera Exchange domain redirects into the SpectroCoin product environment, supporting the successor-brand relationship.
